name: KWESST Micro Systems Inc.
summary: KWESST Micro Systems Inc. develops and commercializes miniaturized technology applications for defense and security industries. The company offers products, such as TASCSTM (Tactical and Situational Control System) for real-time awareness and targeting information from any source; the autonomous GreyGhost soldier-portable micro drone missile system that defends against small hostile drones, including swarms; the Ground Laser Defence System to counter the emerging threat of weaponized lasers against personnel; the Phantom electronic battlefield decoy system to mask the electromagnetic signature of friendly forces with decoy signatures at false locations to deceive and confuse adversaries; and Smart Ordnance System. KWESST Micro Systems Inc. is headquartered in Ottawa, Canada.
